name: Pengana International Equities Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.2497. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.2464 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.2497, stop A$1.2128, target A$1.2711. Risk/reward is 0.58:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
